description: This repository contains a (client-side) web application to automatically generate Codemeta documents (aka. codemeta.json).
name: Auto-CodeMeta Generator

indicators.Fairness: measures Fairness by improving completeness and standardization of software metadata using Codemeta, ensuring proper attribution, citation readiness, and equitable visibility of research software across repositories and platforms.

useCases: Generate standardized codemeta.json files to improve discoverability and interoperability of research software
Ensure proper attribution of software authors and contributors through complete metadata records
Integrate metadata generation into CI/CD pipelines to keep software descriptions up to date
Prepare research software for publication, citation, and indexing in scholarly repositories
